task_updates.executor_notes: Extended Model.complete_turn with optional idempotency_key, updated AnthropicModel to pass it as an Idempotency-Key extra header only when supplied, and updated FakeModel to accept and record it. Extended Ledger.record_pending, Store.insert_pending, and SQLiteStore.insert_pending with optional request_body; SQLite persists it through the request_body TEXT JSON column. run_turn now builds the canonical request_body with model, messages, tools, and ANTHROPIC_MAX_TOKENS; stores system_seq in request_summary; records request_body through Ledger -> Store; and passes the derived idempotency key into model.complete_turn. Verification: tests/test_ledger.py, tests/test_anthropic_model.py, and invocation-mode run_turn/CLI/envelope modules passed; full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 25 tests. A direct smoke check confirmed decoded external_requests.request_body keys, system_seq=1 in request_summary, max_tokens match, and FakeModel received the same idempotency key stored in the ledger. Source-tree leaked-prefix grep returned zero matches.
commands_run: python - <<'PY' ... direct ledger request_body/idempotency smoke check ... PY
rg --hidden --glob '!.megaplan/**' --glob '!__pycache__/**' --glob '!.pytest_cache/**' -n '<leaked Supabase JWT prefix regex>' . || true

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Model.complete_turn accepts idempotency_key; AnthropicModel forwards it via Idempotency-Key extra_headers when present; FakeModel accepts and records it; run_turn records canonical request_body plus system_seq in request_summary through Ledger.record_pending -> SQLiteStore.insert_pending; and tests plus a direct database smoke check verify persistence and idempotency-key threading.
